interest_rate.india_note: RBI repo rate is 6.5%. Personal loan above 24% is predatory.

late_penalty.yellow_if: fixed amount per day below Rs.200
late_penalty.red_if: no upper cap mentioned or above Rs.500 per day
late_penalty.india_note: RBI Fair Practices Code requires disclosure of maximum penalty exposure.

prepayment.india_note: RBI circular mandates no prepayment penalty on floating rate loans.

insurance.india_note: RBI/2020-21/63 prohibits forced bundling of insurance with loans.

arbitration.red_if: lender appointed arbitrator or no arbitration clause
arbitration.india_note: One-sided arbitration clauses are challengeable under Arbitration Act 1996.

monthly_rent.red_if: rent escalation above 10% or not mentioned
monthly_rent.india_note: Model Tenancy Act 2021 recommends reasonable annual escalation.

security_deposit.india_note: Model Tenancy Act 2021 caps security deposit at 2 months for residential.

notice_period.india_note: Standard notice period under Model Tenancy Act is one month.

lock_in_period.green_if: no lock in or below 6 months
lock_in_period.india_note: Long lock-in periods restrict tenant rights under Model Tenancy Act.

notice_period.india_note: Industry standard in India is 30-90 days. Above 90 days is restrictive.

non_compete.red_if: non-compete above 6 months or geographic restriction
non_compete.india_note: Section 27 Indian Contract Act makes most non-compete clauses unenforceable.

probation.india_note: Standard probation in India is 3-6 months.

intellectual_property.green_if: limited to work done for employer
intellectual_property.red_if: assigns all IP including personal projects
intellectual_property.india_note: IP assignment beyond employment scope is challengeable.

confidentiality_period.india_note: Perpetual NDAs are difficult to enforce under Indian Contract Act.

penalties.red_if: unlimited damages or no penalty cap
penalties.india_note: Section 74 Indian Contract Act limits penalty to reasonable compensation.
